items.summary: Ensure the PWA manifest (frontend/public/manifest.json) is fully configured for installable app support: set 'display' to 'standalone', provide correct 'start_url', 'scope', include both 192x192 and 512x512 maskable icons, and set 'orientation' to 'portrait'.

Update the service worker (frontend/public/service-worker.js) to correctly pre-cache all app shell assets, handle offline navigation gracefully, and ensure the cache version is bumped so the new service worker activates immediately after install.

Ensure the app layout is fully responsive and mobile-friendly: the Dashboard bottom navigation bar must be touch-friendly (minimum 44px tap targets), all form inputs must not cause zoom on focus (font-size >= 16px on inputs), and all pages must scroll correctly without horizontal overflow on small screens (320px and up).

Register the service worker in App.tsx only when the app is running in a supported environment (HTTPS or localhost), and handle service worker registration errors gracefully so the app still loads if registration fails.

Add the necessary Apple PWA meta tags to frontend/index.html: apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title, and apple-touch-icon link tags pointing to the app icons in public/.
